case_title: THE STANDARD REGISTER vs. BRAJATAMA INC. et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STANDARD REGISTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAJATAMA INC. $3,697.54 PRINCIPAL, $591.87 INTEREST, $660.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,949.41 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
